tasks.title: LlamaIndex LLM factory (replaces harness/chains/llms.py)
acceptance_criteria: harness/llms.py exports get_llm(tier_id) -> LlamaIndex LLM
Anthropic tiers use llama-index-llms-anthropic Anthropic class
OLMo tier uses OpenAILike with Together AI base_url
llama-index-llms-openai added to pyproject.toml
LangChain LLM imports NOT present in the new file

tasks.title: Workflow infrastructure: typed events and shared utilities
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/__init__.py created
harness/workflows/events.py defines: RetrievedEvent, GradeEvent, InsufficientEvent, GeneratedEvent, ReviewedEvent, SummarizedEvent (all Pydantic Event subclasses)
harness/workflows/utils.py provides: format_docs(), load_system_prompt(), extract_answer() (same logic as current simple_rag.py helpers)
All imports resolve; no LangChain imports

tasks.title: Simple RAG workflows: zero_shot, few_shot, cot_self
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/simple_rag.py defines SimpleRAGWorkflow(Workflow) with strategy param
Single step: retrieve via retrieve_with_config() directly (no EMARetriever bridge), then call LLM
Supports zero_shot / few_shot / cot_self strategies
few_shot_context injected from StartEvent when provided
Output: {'answer_text': str, 'docs': list, 'prompt_strategy': str}

tasks.title: CRAG workflow: retrieve → grade ⇄ rewrite → generate
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/crag.py defines CRAGWorkflow(Workflow)
Steps: retrieve → grade → (if InsufficientEvent) rewrite → retrieve loop, (if RetrievedEvent) generate → StopEvent
Max rewrite cycles enforced via Context counter
Grade uses LlamaIndex LLM (structured output preferred; fallback to string matching)
Output includes docs, answer_text, rewrite_cycles_used

tasks.title: Summarize RAG workflow: retrieve → summarize → generate
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/summarize_rag.py defines SummarizeRAGWorkflow(Workflow)
Steps: retrieve → summarize (LLM condenses docs into 200-word summary) → generate
Summarization uses same LLM instance as generation
Output: {'answer_text': str, 'docs': list, 'summary': str}

tasks.title: Review step: faithfulness check for composite workflows
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/review.py defines review_step() as a standalone @step function and ReviewMixin Workflow base class
Review calls Judge (harness/judge.py) directly — no extra LLM wrapper
Emits ReviewedEvent(score, feedback, passed=score>=threshold)
Threshold configurable (default 0.6); max_review_cycles configurable (default 1)

tasks.title: ReAct agent workflow with 4 EMA tools
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/react.py defines build_react_workflow() factory
Uses LlamaIndex FunctionAgent with 4 tools: ema_search, follow_cross_refs, filter_by_topic, get_qa_by_id
Tools call harness/retrieve.py directly (no EMARetriever bridge, no mutable _last_docs state)
Wrapped in a thin Workflow so it has the same invoke() / ainvoke() interface as other workflows
Output: {'answer_text': str, 'docs': list, 'trajectory': list, 'cited_qa_ids': list}

tasks.title: Composite workflows and registry (9 strategies)
acceptance_criteria: harness/workflows/composites.py defines CRAGSummarizeWorkflow, CRAGReviewWorkflow, ReactReviewWorkflow
harness/workflows/registry.py exports get_workflow(name, index, llm) and list_workflows()
All 9 strategies registered: simple_rag_zero, simple_rag_few, simple_rag_cot, react, crag, summarize_rag, crag_summarize, crag_review, react_review
Each workflow has a sync invoke({'question': str}) and async ainvoke({'question': str})
Output dict is uniform: answer_text, docs, prompt_strategy — extra keys allowed per strategy

tasks.title: Update app.py: replace LangGraph pipeline with LlamaIndex Workflow
acceptance_criteria: _build_session_pipeline() replaced with _build_session_workflow() using get_workflow() from harness/workflows/registry.py
No imports from harness.chains, langchain_anthropic, langgraph
pipeline.ainvoke() → workflow.ainvoke() with same {'question': str, 'few_shot_context': str} interface
result['docs'] is list of dicts with 'metadata' and 'page_content' keys OR adapted to match downstream usage in app.py
Chainlit session starts successfully (manual smoke test)

tasks.title: Delete LangChain code and strip deps from pyproject.toml
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/ directory deleted
harness/langsmith_dataset.py deleted
harness/run_langsmith_eval.py deleted
harness/agents/react_agent.py deleted (deprecated since LG-007)
pyproject.toml no longer lists: langchain-core, langchain-anthropic, langchain-openai, langchain-community, langgraph, langsmith
pip install -e '.[dev]' succeeds with no LangChain packages installed
ruff check . passes

tasks.title: Replace LangChain test suite with Workflow tests
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_langchain_chains.py deleted
tests/test_pipeline_nodes.py deleted
tests/test_workflows.py created: unit tests for SimpleRAGWorkflow, CRAGWorkflow, SummarizeRAGWorkflow using mocked index and LLM
tests/test_workflow_registry.py created: tests for get_workflow(), list_workflows()
pytest passes with no LangChain imports in any test file
